Categories.value: People of Poland|CC-BY-SA-3.0,2.5,2.0,1.0|Montages of ethnic groups|Montages of people of Poland

ImageDescription.value: Collage of photos of 32 Polish known figures – *1st row, left to right: Pope John Paul II, Mieszko I – c. 930, Mikołaj Kopernik – 1473, John III Sobieski – 1629, Casimir Pulaski – 1745, Tadeusz Kościuszko – 1746, Adam Mickiewicz – 1798, Emilia Plater – 1806, *2nd row, left to right: Juliusz Słowacki – 1809, Fryderyk Chopin – 1810, Stanisław Moniuszko – 1819, Jan Matejko – 1838, Helena Modjeska – 1840, Henryk Sienkiewicz – 1846, Ignacy Jan Paderewski – 1860, Maria Skłodowska-Curie – 1867, *3rd row, left to right: Władysław Reymont – 1867, Józef Piłsudski – 1867, Pola Negri – 1897, Witold Pilecki – 1901, Stefan Wyszyński – 1901, Faustina Kowalska – 1905, Marian Rejewski – 1905, Irena Sendler – 1910, *4th row, left to right: Czesław Miłosz – 1911, Jan Karski – 1914, Wisława Szymborska – 1923, Zbigniew Herbert – 1924, Wojciech Kilar – 1932, Henryk Górecki – 1933, Jerzy Popiełuszko – 1947, Robert Lewandowski – 1988.
